title: Mission Critical With Neal Barnard, MD
title_en: Mission Critical With Neal Barnard, MD
h1: Mission Critical With Neal Barnard, MD
h1_en: Mission Critical With Neal Barnard, MD
paragraphs: Join us for this week’s Mission Critical update on Friday, April 3, at 2 p.m. ET. Physicians Committee President Neal Barnard, MD, will give a tribute to Dr. Pippin, PCRM’s former director of academic affairs, and share his outstanding work freeing animals from experiments and changing medical training programs to be proponents of not only humane practices but human relevant research. We will continue the episode in Dr. Pippin’s honor, providing the latest news in PCRM’s work creating a healthier, more compassionate world. Host Betsy Wason will welcome PCRM Science Policy Specialist Jon McCord, PhD, who will give us the latest updates from the Society of Toxicology Annual Meeting, and Em Perryman, MS, RDN, who will share exciting news about who’s coming to Washington in August. We look forward to hearing your questions and seeing you live in the chat.
Want a preview? Explore our Mission Critical Playlist, updated weekly with past episodes.
New to Mission Critical? Register once at the link below to join live and take part in the chat. Already registered? Your Zoom link will arrive in a reminder email before Friday’s broadcast.
